Storyhouse Design System

An elite design system built for enterprise scale. Production-ready components, comprehensive design tokens, and exceptional developer experience — all powered by TypeScript, Storybook, and Astro.

Production Components

250+

Design Tokens

100%

Test Coverage

Built for scale. Designed for people.

Every decision in Storyhouse is made with one goal: make your team faster and your product more consistent.

Production Ready

Every component is built for enterprise with comprehensive testing, accessibility, and TypeScript strict mode.

High Performance

Optimized for speed with tree-shaking, code splitting, and minimal bundle size. Zero runtime overhead.

Developer Experience

Comprehensive documentation, TypeScript support, Storybook integration, and intuitive APIs that your team will love.

Components at a glance

Five production-ready components, each with full documentation and interactive examples.

Button

4 variants, 3 sizes, loading state

Card

4 variants, 4 sub-components

Input

Labels, errors, icons, 3 sizes

Badge

6 variants, dot, removable

Avatar

5 sizes, 2 shapes, initials
View all components

Start using Storyhouse in your project today. Production-ready components, comprehensive tokens, and exceptional DX.
